
```{r}
#| include: false

objs <- readRDS(here::here("outputs", "objects", "analysis_script_objects.rds"))
list2env(objs, envir = knitr::knit_global())

```

# Appendices

## Appendix 1. List of Excluded Reviews {#sec-appendix1}

```{r}
#| #label: tbl-a1
#| #tbl-cap: "Excluded Reviews"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

a1_formatted

```


## Appendix 2. List of Reviews Awaiting Classification {#sec-appendix2}

```{r}
#| #label: tbl-a2
#| #tbl-cap: "Reviews Awaiting Classification"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

a3_formatted

```


## Appendix 3. Descriptive Characteristics for Included Systematic Reviews {#sec-appendix3}

```{r}
#| #label: tbl-a3
#| #tbl-cap: "Review Information"
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Print in document
htmltools::browsable(htmltools::HTML(html_code))

```
